a:r.a:t: Percentage of deals with recognized intangible asset category
Average relative share of goodwill as a % of EV
Median fair value as a % of EV by intangible asset category
Source: KPMG Pre-Deal PPA benchmarking database.

p:cNvPr.name: Rectangle: Top Corners One Rounded and One Snipped 15

a:r.a:t: Please coordinate with your local Valuation team and consult the
before applying Valuation+ to the report.
